name: Minimal Clean Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#1a1a2e"/>
  
      <!-- Outer ring -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="200" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
      
      <!-- Hour markers -->
      <line x1="225" y1="40" x2="225" y2="55" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="225" y="15" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">12</text>
  <line x1="317.5" y1="64.78530029987886" x2="310" y2="77.77568135664544" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>

  <line x1="317.5" y1="385.2146997001212" x2="310" y2="372.22431864335454" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="330" y="406.8653347947321" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">5</text>
  <line x1="225" y1="410" x2="225" y2="395" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <line x1="132.50000000000006" y1="385.2146997001212" x2="140.00000000000006" y2="372.2243186433546" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="120.00000000000004" y="406.8653347947321" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">7</text>
  <line x1="64.78530029987883" y1="317.5" x2="77.7756813566454" y2="310" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="43.13466520526788" y="330" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">8</text>
  <line x1="40" y1="225.00000000000003" x2="55" y2="225.00000000000003" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <line x1="132.49999999999991" y1="64.78530029987888" x2="139.99999999999994" y2="77.77568135664546" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <text x="119.9999999999999" y="43.13466520526791" fill="#ffffff" font-size="24" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">11</text>
      
      <!-- Clock hands -->
      
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="287.6086525481931" y2="175.19882906899045" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
